title: BFUHS Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 04 Accountant, Cashier Posts
description: The Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 04 Accountant, Clerk, Cashier Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post-graduation, and B.E./B. Tech can apply for the BFUHS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education deta...
